name: Hattie Anderson's Pickled Artichokes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place artichokes and sliced onions in sterilized jars.
2. Add peppers to the jars.
3. Mix dry ingredients with vinegar in a separate bowl until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture over the artichokes and onions, ensuring everything is submerged.
5. Seal the jars while hot and process according to your preferred method (e.g., water bath canning).
6. Let the pickled artichokes season for at least one month before opening.
7. Turn the jar upside down and shake every few days, making sure to place a different end up each time so the seasoning does not settle too long.
